name: Confocal Z-Stack Projection and Depth Profiling
description: You are a neuroscientist analyzing a confocal z-stack of a Drosophila brain. Using the 'Fly Brain' sample in Fiji, generate five specific outputs to characterize the data. Create a Maximum Intensity Projection (MIP) of the entire stack and save it to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/fly_brain_MIP.tif. Create an Average Intensity Projection (AVG) of the entire stack and save it to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/fly_brain_AVG.tif. Perform an Orthogonal Reslice to create an XZ view and save it to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/fly_brain_reslice_XZ.tif. Create a Montage showing a subset of slices and save it to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/fly_brain_montage.tif. Measure the mean intensity of each slice across the z-depth and save the values as a CSV file to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/fly_brain_z_profile.csv. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
